settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account settings, subscription and usage statistics.
settings.loginRequired: Please log in to view your account settings
settings.closeAccountDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
settings.closeAccountWarning: Warning: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
settings.closeAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to close your account? This action cannot be undone.
settings.cancelSubBeforeClose: Please cancel your subscription before closing your account.
settings.fetchSubscriptionFailed: Unable to fetch account status. Please try again later.
settings.closeAccountError: Error closing account. Please try again later.
